name: Automated Backup Monitoring
description: Weekly backup health check with schedule management
prompts: List all backup schedules for project {{PROJECT_ID}} and show their frequency and last execution time
List all recent backups for project {{PROJECT_ID}} from the past 7 days and check for any gaps in coverage
Create a manual backup for project {{PROJECT_ID}} with description 'Manual Test Backup {{RUN_ID}}' expiring in 7 days
Create a new backup schedule for project {{PROJECT_ID}} with description 'Daily Backup Schedule {{RUN_ID}}' set to run daily at 2 AM (cron: 0 2 * * *) with 30-day retention
